testcase.name: verifyStudentAppOverviewSideNav

failure.message: The following asserts failed: [Student App Overview] [ID=29] [School Web Portal › Incidents] Link: "How to View and Add People Involved" | H1: "How to View and Add People Involved in Incident" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/incidents/people-involved/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=40] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Update a School Logo?" | H1: "How to Update a School Logo" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/update-logo/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=41] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Change School Name and Contact Details?" | H1: "How to Change School Name and Contact Details" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/change-name-contact/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=42] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Set a Brand Color of the School?" | H1: "How to Set a Brand Color of the School" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/set-brand-color/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=43] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Configure Grade and Class Globally?" | H1: "How to Configure Grade and Class Globally" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/configure-grade-class/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=56] [School Web Portal › Chat Groups] Link: "How to Add or Remove Student Representative" | H1: "How to Add or Remove Student Representatives" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/chat-groups/manage-representatives/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=82] [Student App › Incidents] Link: "What Does Requested Confidentiality Mean" | H1: "What Does Requested Confidentiality Mean?" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/student-app/incidents/requested-confidentiality/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=83] [Student App › Incidents] Link: "How to Attach More Evidences After Reporting" | H1: "How to Attach More Evidences After Reporting an Incident" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/student-app/incidents/attach-evidence/ expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: [Student App Overview] [ID=29] [School Web Portal › Incidents] Link: "How to View and Add People Involved" | H1: "How to View and Add People Involved in Incident" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/incidents/people-involved/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=40] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Update a School Logo?" | H1: "How to Update a School Logo" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/update-logo/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=41] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Change School Name and Contact Details?" | H1: "How to Change School Name and Contact Details" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/change-name-contact/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=42] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Set a Brand Color of the School?" | H1: "How to Set a Brand Color of the School" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/set-brand-color/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=43] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Configure Grade and Class Globally?" | H1: "How to Configure Grade and Class Globally" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/configure-grade-class/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=56] [School Web Portal › Chat Groups] Link: "How to Add or Remove Student Representative" | H1: "How to Add or Remove Student Representatives" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/chat-groups/manage-representatives/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=82] [Student App › Incidents] Link: "What Does Requested Confidentiality Mean" | H1: "What Does Requested Confidentiality Mean?" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/student-app/incidents/requested-confidentiality/ expected [true] but found [false], [Student App Overview] [ID=83] [Student App › Incidents] Link: "How to Attach More Evidences After Reporting" | H1: "How to Attach More Evidences After Reporting an Incident" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/student-app/incidents/attach-evidence/ expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:46) at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:30) at com.jiverjinxDocs.tests.RedirectTest.runExcelDrivenAudit(RedirectTest.java:157) at com.jiverjinxDocs.tests.RedirectTest.verifyStudentAppOverviewSideNav(RedirectTest.java:108) at testcase.name: verifyWebPortalOverviewSideNav

failure.message: The following asserts failed: [Web Portal Overview] [ID=29] [School Web Portal › Incidents] Link: "How to View and Add People Involved" | H1: "How to View and Add People Involved in Incident" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/incidents/people-involved/ expected [true] but found [false], [Web Portal Overview] [ID=40] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Update a School Logo?" | H1: "How to Update a School Logo" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/update-logo/ expected [true] but found [false], [Web Portal Overview] [ID=41] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Change School Name and Contact Details?" | H1: "How to Change School Name and Contact Details" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/change-name-contact/ expected [true] but found [false], [Web Portal Overview] [ID=42] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Set a Brand Color of the School?" | H1: "How to Set a Brand Color of the School" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/set-brand-color/ expected [true] but found [false], [Web Portal Overview] [ID=43] [School Web Portal › School] Link: "How to Configure Grade and Class Globally?" | H1: "How to Configure Grade and Class Globally" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/school/configure-grade-class/ expected [true] but found [false], [Web Portal Overview] [ID=56] [School Web Portal › Chat Groups] Link: "How to Add or Remove Student Representative" | H1: "How to Add or Remove Student Representatives" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/chat-groups/manage-representatives/ expected [true] but found [false], [Web Portal Overview] [ID=82] [Student App › Incidents] Link: "What Does Requested Confidentiality Mean" | H1: "What Does Requested Confidentiality Mean?" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/student-app/incidents/requested-confidentiality/ expected [true] but found [false], [Web Portal Overview] [ID=83] [Student App › Incidents] Link: "How to Attach More Evidences After Reporting" | H1: "How to Attach More Evidences After Reporting an Incident" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/student-app/incidents/attach-evidence/ expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: [Web Portal Overview] [ID=29] [School Web Portal › Incidents] Link: "How to View and Add People Involved" | H1: "How to View testcase.name: verifyHomePageLinks

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Mismatch — Link: "Registration" | H1: "Overview" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/registration/overview/ expected [true] but found [false], Mismatch — Link: "Incidents" | H1: "Overview" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/incidents/overview/ expected [true] but found [false], Mismatch — Link: "Getting Started" | H1: "Student App Overview" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/getting-started/student-app-overview/ expected [true] but found [false], Mismatch — Link: "Registration" | H1: "Overview" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/student-app/registration/overview/ expected [true] but found [false], Mismatch — Link: "Incidents" | H1: "Overview" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/student-app/incidents/overview/ expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Mismatch — Link: "Registration" | H1: "Overview" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/registration/overview/ expected [true] but found [false], Mismatch — Link: "Incidents" | H1: "Overview" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/web-portal/features/incidents/overview/ expected [true] but found [false], Mismatch — Link: "Getting Started" | H1: "Student App Overview" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/getting-started/student-app-overview/ expected [true] but found [false], Mismatch — Link: "Registration" | H1: "Overview" | URL: https://docs.jiverjinx.com/student-app/registration/overview/ expected [true] but found [false], Mismatch — Link: "Incidents" | H1: "Overview" | URL:
